name: same_item_order_client_name_abbreviated_differentl
description: Same item order, client name abbreviated differently across threads
expected_output: Single order: Tandoor for 51 Sub Area, placed with Sharma ji. Both references are same order same client.
pass_criteria: PASS: Single order record for 51 Sub Area, no duplicate created. FAIL: Two separate order records created.
challenge: Same order referenced with abbreviated client name ('51 SA') in one thread and full name ('51 Sub Area') in another. Agent must recognise as same order not duplicate.
notes: Tests order deduplication — inverse of conflation test
